description: This file defines and exports immutable values, configuration settings, and reusable static data used throughout the application to ensure consistency.
This file typically serves as the main entry point for a TypeScript application or module, often used to export public members or initialize the program.
This file serves as a central entry point that aggregates and exports various data validation or database schemas defined within the directory for easier access throughout the application.
This file likely manages the application's connection to a database and provides utility functions for executing queries or interacting with data models.
This file likely manages integration with Google's Gemini AI API, providing methods to send prompts and process responses for generative AI tasks.
This script likely provides a utility or function to initialize and store new memory entries or data structures within the application's storage system.
This utility script searches for and retrieves a list of files within the project directory based on specified patterns or criteria.
This script scans and processes the project's source files to generate a searchable index or metadata repository for the codebase.

This script likely initializes or tracks the status of a project's setup process or environment configuration. It may be used to verify whether necessary initialization steps have been successfully completed.
This tool retrieves stored information or historical context from a memory system to provide relevant data for current tasks.
This file likely defines shared TypeScript interfaces, types, and enums used to ensure consistent data structures and type safety across the application.
This file likely implements a web server to serve the frontend application and handle server-side rendering or API requests for the user interface.
This file implements JSON Web Token (JWT) logic, including token generation, validation, and middleware for securing application routes.
This middleware validates JWT tokens to protect routes and ensure that only authenticated users can access specific endpoints.
This file defines the API endpoints for user authentication, including login, logout, and token refresh operations. It also integrates middleware to handle JWT-based route protection.
